     the Fermi energy is     2.5506 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.71481463 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.4E-11 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27121099 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8074.44360364 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -207526.34098844 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  104635.80822574 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3118.78173017 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   97936.78401232 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.91312310 Ry

     total magnetization       =    33.37 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    36.40 Bohr mag/cell
